themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "וְלַמֻּרְבָּ֑כֶת: and for that which is fried - to soak (bread in oil)".
